---
id: cache-item-delete-all
title: "Deletes all key-value cache items belonging to an app"
description: "Deletes all key-value cache items created by the builds of an app. Deleted cache items are no longer accessible and cannot be restored."
sidebar_label: "Deletes all key-value cache items belonging to an app"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Deletes all key-value cache items belonging to an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/cache-items"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes all key-value cache items created by the builds of an app. Deleted cache items are no longer accessible and cannot be restored.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
